text: Stepping into this sleek, modern space, I feel an immediate sense of anticipation, as if I am about to witness the forefront of innovation. The first image, with its glass walls and tidiness, gives off a sense of order and possibility—a threshold into ideas yet to be explored. As I move closer to the vivid, interactive 'R+D' wall, excitement stirs within me. The energy of research—humans and machines collaborating—sparks a kind of intellectual camaraderie, making me feel energized and curious to learn about the fusion of creativity and technology all around me. I feel both grounded by the discipline of the space and uplifted by its vibrant call to discovery.
